text: The clinical chill of the hallway gave way to a surge of curiosity as I stepped into this vibrant R&D space. Surrounded by artifacts and glowing screens, I sense an air of anticipation and reflection—here, boundaries between human and machine blur. The philosophical questions about who we are, how we create, and what it means to coexist with intelligent machines buzz quietly in my mind. I feel small but engaged, aware of my own role as both an observer and a participant in this unfolding narrative of progress.
